---
title: "Conservação · Tsiino Hiiwiida"
subtitle: "Coleções, dados e conhecimento científico para apoiar a conservação da biodiversidade no Alto Rio Negro"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: auto
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - ../figures/
  - ../figures/brand/
  - ../_input_data/
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
library(plotly)
library(htmltools)
library(scales)

find_up <- function(rel_path, start = getwd(), max_levels = 8) {
  d <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  for (i in 0:max_levels) {
    cand <- file.path(d, rel_path)
    if (file.exists(cand)) return(cand)
    parent <- dirname(d)
    if (identical(parent, d)) break
    d <- parent
  }
  NA_character_
}

pick_col <- function(data, candidates, required = FALSE, label = NULL) {
  hit <- intersect(candidates, names(data))
  if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[1])

  names_low <- tolower(names(data))
  cand_low <- tolower(candidates)
  hit_i <- match(cand_low, names_low)
  hit_i <- hit_i[!is.na(hit_i)]

  if (length(hit_i) > 0) return(names(data)[hit_i[1]])

  if (required) {
    stop(
      "Não encontrei a coluna ", ifelse(is.null(label), paste(candidates, collapse = "/"), label), ".\n",
      "Colunas disponíveis: ", paste(names(data), collapse = ", ")
    )
  }

  NA_character_
}

nz <- function(x) {
  !is.na(x) & nzchar(trimws(as.character(x)))
}

clean_text <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x)] <- NA_character_
  str_squish(x)
}

to_year <- function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    y <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(x))
    y[y < 1500 | y > year(Sys.Date()) + 2] <- NA_integer_
    return(y)
  }

  x_chr <- as.character(x)
  x_chr <- str_squish(x_chr)

  y1 <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(x_chr))
  y1[y1 < 1500 | y1 > year(Sys.Date()) + 2] <- NA_integer_

  needs_parse <- is.na(y1) & nz(x_chr)

  if (any(needs_parse)) {
    parsed <- suppressWarnings(lubridate::parse_date_time(
      x_chr[needs_parse],
      orders = c("ymd", "dmy", "mdy", "Y", "Ym", "Ymd", "dmY", "mdY"),
      quiet = TRUE
    ))

    y1[needs_parse] <- lubridate::year(parsed)
  }

  y1
}

format_int <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), "—", format(x, big.mark = ".", decimal.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE))
}

detect_group <- function(df, kingdom_col = NA, higher_col = NA) {
  kingdom <- if (!is.na(kingdom_col)) clean_text(df[[kingdom_col]]) else rep(NA_character_, nrow(df))
  higher <- if (!is.na(higher_col)) clean_text(df[[higher_col]]) else rep(NA_character_, nrow(df))

  txt <- str_to_lower(paste(kingdom, higher))

  dplyr::case_when(
    str_detect(txt, "plantae|plant|viridiplantae|tracheophyta|bryophyta|magnoliophyta") ~ "Plantas",
    str_detect(txt, "fungi|fungo|fungos|ascomycota|basidiomycota|glomeromycota") ~ "Fungos",
    TRUE ~ "Outros"
  )
}

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Input
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

xlsx_path <- find_up(file.path("_input_data", "diversidade_tsiino.xlsx"))

if (is.na(xlsx_path)) {
  stop(
    "Não encontrei o arquivo '_input_data/diversidade_tsiino.xlsx'.\n",
    "Salve o compilado Darwin Core nesse caminho para atualizar o dashboard automaticamente."
  )
}

sheet_names <- readxl::excel_sheets(xlsx_path)
main_sheet <- sheet_names[1]

dwc_raw <- readxl::read_xlsx(xlsx_path, sheet = main_sheet) |>
  as.data.frame(check.names = FALSE)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Colunas Darwin Core ou equivalentes
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

scientific_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c(
    "scientificName", "scientific_name", "ScientificName",
    "acceptedNameUsage", "accepted_name", "nome_cientifico",
    "nome científico", "species", "Species", "taxon"
  ),
  required = TRUE,
  label = "scientificName"
)

family_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c("family", "Family", "familia", "família", "Current Family", "Corrected Family"),
  required = FALSE
)

genus_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c("genus", "Genus", "genero", "gênero"),
  required = FALSE
)

kingdom_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c("kingdom", "Kingdom", "reino", "Reino"),
  required = FALSE
)

higher_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c(
    "phylum", "Phylum", "division", "Division", "class", "Class",
    "higherClassification", "higher_classification", "grupo", "Grupo",
    "organism_type", "organismType", "tipo_organismo"
  ),
  required = FALSE
)

date_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c("eventDate", "event_date", "date", "Data", "data", "collectionDate", "recordedDate"),
  required = FALSE
)

year_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c("year", "Year", "ano", "Ano", "eventYear", "recordYear"),
  required = FALSE
)

record_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c(
    "occurrenceID", "occurrenceId", "catalogNumber", "recordNumber",
    "collectionCode", "fieldNumber", "id", "ID", "voucher", "Voucher"
  ),
  required = FALSE
)

latitude_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c("decimalLatitude", "decimal_latitude", "latitude", "Latitude", "lat", "Lat"),
  required = FALSE
)

longitude_col <- pick_col(
  dwc_raw,
  c("decimalLongitude", "decimal_longitude", "longitude", "Longitude", "lon", "long", "Long"),
  required = FALSE
)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Dados tratados
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

dwc <- dwc_raw |>
  mutate(
    scientific_name = clean_text(.data[[scientific_col]]),
    family_name = if (!is.na(family_col)) clean_text(.data[[family_col]]) else NA_character_,
    genus_name = if (!is.na(genus_col)) clean_text(.data[[genus_col]]) else str_extract(scientific_name, "^[A-Za-zÀ-ÿ-]+"),
    record_id = if (!is.na(record_col)) clean_text(.data[[record_col]]) else as.character(row_number()),
    year_record = dplyr::coalesce(
      if (!is.na(year_col)) to_year(.data[[year_col]]) else NA_integer_,
      if (!is.na(date_col)) to_year(.data[[date_col]]) else NA_integer_
    ),
    organism_group = detect_group(cur_data(), kingdom_col = kingdom_col, higher_col = higher_col)
  ) |>
  filter(nz(scientific_name))

# manter foco no dashboard pedido
dwc_focus <- dwc |>
  filter(organism_group %in% c("Plantas", "Fungos"))

if (nrow(dwc_focus) == 0) {
  dwc_focus <- dwc |>
    mutate(organism_group = ifelse(is.na(organism_group) | organism_group == "Outros", "Sem grupo definido", organism_group))
}

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Métricas principais
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

total_records <- nrow(dwc_focus)
total_species <- n_distinct(dwc_focus$scientific_name)
total_families <- n_distinct(dwc_focus$family_name[nz(dwc_focus$family_name)])
total_genera <- n_distinct(dwc_focus$genus_name[nz(dwc_focus$genus_name)])
earliest_record <- suppressWarnings(min(dwc_focus$year_record, na.rm = TRUE))
latest_record <- suppressWarnings(max(dwc_focus$year_record, na.rm = TRUE))

if (!is.finite(earliest_record)) earliest_record <- NA_integer_
if (!is.finite(latest_record)) latest_record <- NA_integer_

plants_species <- dwc_focus |>
  filter(organism_group == "Plantas") |>
  summarise(n = n_distinct(scientific_name), .groups = "drop") |>
  pull(n)

fungi_species <- dwc_focus |>
  filter(organism_group == "Fungos") |>
  summarise(n = n_distinct(scientific_name), .groups = "drop") |>
  pull(n)

if (length(plants_species) == 0) plants_species <- 0
if (length(fungi_species) == 0) fungi_species <- 0

group_summary <- dwc_focus |>
  distinct(organism_group, scientific_name) |>
  count(organism_group, name = "species") |>
  arrange(desc(species)) |>
  mutate(
    pct = species / sum(species),
    label = paste0(format_int(species), " espécies | ", percent(pct, accuracy = 0.1, decimal.mark = ","))
  )

family_top <- dwc_focus |>
  filter(nz(family_name)) |>
  distinct(family_name, scientific_name, organism_group) |>
  count(family_name, organism_group, name = "species") |>
  arrange(desc(species)) |>
  slice_head(n = 12)

cumulative <- dwc_focus |>
  filter(!is.na(year_record)) |>
  distinct(year_record, scientific_name) |>
  arrange(year_record, scientific_name) |>
  group_by(year_record) |>
  summarise(new_species = n_distinct(scientific_name), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(year_record) |>
  mutate(cumulative_species = cumsum(new_species))

last_species <- dwc_focus |>
  filter(!is.na(year_record)) |>
  arrange(desc(year_record)) |>
  slice(1) |>
  pull(scientific_name)

if (length(last_species) == 0) last_species <- "—"

missing_family <- sum(!nz(dwc_focus$family_name))
missing_year <- sum(is.na(dwc_focus$year_record))

if (!is.na(latitude_col) && !is.na(longitude_col)) {
  lat_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dwc_focus[[latitude_col]]))
  lon_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dwc_focus[[longitude_col]]))
  missing_coords <- sum(is.na(lat_num) | is.na(lon_num))
} else {
  missing_coords <- NA_integer_
}

gap_summary <- data.frame(
  indicador = c("Sem família", "Sem ano", "Sem coordenadas"),
  registros = c(missing_family, missing_year, missing_coords),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) |>
  filter(!is.na(registros)) |>
  arrange(desc(registros))

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plotly global config
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

plotly_config <- list(
  displayModeBar = TRUE,
  responsive = TRUE,
  displaylogo = FALSE,
  modeBarButtonsToRemove = list(
    "lasso2d", "select2d", "autoScale2d", "toggleSpikelines"
  )
)
```

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
```

```{=html}
<style>
  :root{
    --red: #A93632;
    --red-dark: #6E1F1D;
    --green: #626A38;
    --green-map: #59602F;
    --green-dark: #2E3B24;
    --green-soft: #D7DDC5;
    --ochre: #D99A27;
    --cream: #F6F1E8;
    --paper: #FFFDF7;
    --ink: #171717;
    --muted: #675F55;
    --line: rgba(98,106,56,0.24);
  }

  *{ box-sizing: border-box; }

  html{
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  body{
    overflow-x: hidden;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    background:
      linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.88), rgba(246,241,232,0.88)),
      url("../figures/tsiino_bg.png");
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-size: cover;
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-position: center top;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  body.nav-fixed{
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  #quarto-content,
  .page-columns,
  .page-layout-full,
  main.content,
  main,
  .content{
    width: 100%;
    background: transparent !important;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  main.content{ padding-bottom: 3.5rem; }
  .quarto-title-block{ display: none !important; }

  /* NAVBAR SOBRE HERO */
  #quarto-header{
    position: absolute !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    left: 0 !important;
    right: 0 !important;
    z-index: 10000 !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar{
    position: relative !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    border-bottom: 0 !important;
    min-height: 76px;
    backdrop-filter: none !important;
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-header::before{
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0 0 auto 0;
    height: 126px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.46) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.20) 62%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: -1;
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar-brand{ display: none !important; }

  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link,
  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link:visited{
    color: #fff !important;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link.active,
  #quarto-header .navbar .nav-link:hover{ color: var(--ochre) !important; }

  #quarto-header .navbar svg,
  #quarto-header .navbar i,
  #quarto-header .navbar .bi,
  #quarto-header .quarto-navbar-tools a,
  #quarto-header .quarto-navbar-tools button,
  #quarto-header .aa-DetachedSearchButton,
  #quarto-header .aa-DetachedSearchButtonIcon,
  #quarto-header .quarto-color-scheme-toggle{
    color: #fff !important;
    fill: #fff !important;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.55));
  }

  /* HERO — posição e proporção padronizadas com a página Sobre */
  .page-hero{
    position: relative;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 100vw;
    min-height: 100vh;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    overflow: hidden;
    isolation: isolate;
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center center;
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  .page-hero-conservation{
    background-image: url("../figures/diversidade_01.jpg"), url("../figures/tsiino_hero.jpg"), url("../figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  }

  .page-hero-overlay{
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: -2;
    background:
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.46) 42%, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 100%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.25) 48%, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 100%);
  }

  .page-hero-logo{
    position: absolute;
    top: clamp(5.2rem, 9vw, 7rem);
    left: clamp(1.5rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem);
    width: clamp(92px, 8vw, 132px);
    min-height: auto;
    display: block;
    padding: 0;
    background: transparent !important;
    border: 0 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    z-index: 5;
  }

  .page-hero-logo img{
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.35));
  }

  .page-hero-content{
    position: absolute;
    left: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
    top: clamp(14.5rem, 32vh, 18rem);
    bottom: auto;
    width: min(940px, calc(100% - 4rem));
    color: #fff;
    padding-top: 0;
    z-index: 4;
  }

  .hero-kicker{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: clamp(0.68rem, 1vw, 0.82rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ochre);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
  }

  .page-hero-content h1{
    margin: 0;
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem);
    line-height: 0.9;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: -0.07em;
    text-shadow: 0 3px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
  }

  .hero-subtitle{
    margin: 1rem 0 0 0 !important;
    color: #F6F1E8 !important;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
    font-size: clamp(0.74rem, 1.32vw, 0.98rem) !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1.45 !important;
    max-width: 960px;
    text-wrap: balance;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.70);
  }

  .hero-description{
    margin: 0.9rem 0 0 0 !important;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92) !important;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw, 1.2rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.58 !important;
    max-width: 760px;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.68);
  }

  .hero-actions{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.65rem;
    margin-top: 1.25rem;
  }

  .btn-main,
  .btn-ghost{
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.45rem;
    padding: 0.68rem 1.05rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
  }

  .btn-main{
    background: var(--red);
    color: #fff !important;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
  }

  .btn-ghost{
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.90);
    color: var(--green-dark) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
  }

  .btn-main:hover,
  .btn-ghost:hover{
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.24);
  }

  /* CARDS E TIPOGRAFIA */
  .content-card{
    width: min(1120px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
    margin: 2.6rem auto 0 auto;
    padding: clamp(1.35rem, 3vw, 2.35rem);
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    border-top: 5px solid var(--green);
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  .content-inner{
    width: min(1030px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .section-title{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .section-title::before{
    content: "";
    display: block;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--ink);
  }

  .section-title h2{
    margin: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.6vw, 1.85rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--red);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .content-card p{
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.98rem;
    line-height: 1.72;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
  }

  .lead{
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.26rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.72 !important;
    color: #191711 !important;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--ochre);
    padding-left: 1rem;
    margin: 0 0 1.3rem 0 !important;
  }

  .axis-eyebrow{
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
    padding: 0.28rem 0.65rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    background: rgba(98,106,56,0.11);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.09em;
  }

  .axis-title{
    color: var(--red);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2.6vw, 2rem);
    font-weight: 850;
    letter-spacing: -0.035em;
    line-height: 1.12;
    margin: 0 0 0.9rem 0;
  }

  /* VISÃO GERAL E EIXOS */
  .overview-card{
    margin-top: 2.6rem;
  }

  .axis-switch{
    width: min(900px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto 1.55rem auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .axis-switch-card{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
    grid-template-rows: auto auto auto;
    column-gap: 0.85rem;
    row-gap: 0.2rem;
    min-height: 156px;
    padding: 1.05rem 1.1rem;
    border-radius: 22px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 92% 8%, rgba(217,154,39,0.18), transparent 34%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.95), rgba(246,241,232,0.76));
    box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    text-decoration: none !important;
    color: var(--ink) !important;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
  }

  .axis-switch-card::before{
    content: attr(data-number);
    grid-row: 1 / span 3;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 2.1rem;
    height: 2.1rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: var(--green);
    color: var(--cream);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .axis-switch-card:hover{
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.13);
    border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.26);
  }

  .axis-switch-card strong{
    display: block;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.7vw, 1.22rem);
    line-height: 1.18;
    font-weight: 850;
  }

  .axis-switch-card span:not(.axis-arrow){
    display: block;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    line-height: 1.42;
  }

  .axis-switch-card .axis-arrow{
    align-self: end;
    justify-self: start;
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
    color: var(--red);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .overview-layout{
    width: min(980px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(280px, 0.72fr);
    gap: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
    align-items: start;
  }

  .overview-aside{
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.75rem;
  }

  .overview-mini{
    padding: 0.95rem;
    border-radius: 16px;
    background: rgba(98,106,56,0.10);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  }

  .overview-mini strong{
    display: block;
    color: var(--red);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.09em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  }

  .overview-mini span{
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-weight: 750;
    line-height: 1.35;
  }

  .axis-section{ scroll-margin-top: 90px; }

  .axis-content{
    width: min(1030px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .axis-feature-grid{
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
    gap: clamp(1.35rem, 2.6vw, 2.2rem);
    align-items: start;
  }

  .axis-feature-copy{ min-width: 0; }

  .axis-feature-panel{
    min-width: 0;
    padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
    border-radius: 24px;
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(217,154,39,0.13), transparent 32%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.92), rgba(246,241,232,0.76));
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
    box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.09);
  }

  .axis-grid{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 0.85rem;
  }

  .axis-info-card{
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    border-left: 5px solid var(--green-map);
    border-radius: 16px;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.86);
    padding: 0.95rem;
    min-height: 130px;
  }

  .axis-info-card h4{
    margin: 0 0 0.45rem 0;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .axis-info-card p{
    margin: 0 !important;
    color: var(--muted) !important;
    font-size: 0.9rem !important;
    line-height: 1.55 !important;
  }

  .axis-flow{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 0.8rem;
    margin-top: 1.35rem;
  }

  .axis-flow-step{
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.86);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    border-top: 4px solid var(--ochre);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 0.9rem;
    min-height: 120px;
  }

  .axis-flow-step strong{
    display: block;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }

  .axis-flow-step span{
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.86rem;
    line-height: 1.45;
  }

  .note-box{
    margin-top: 1rem;
    padding: 1rem;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--ochre);
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.72);
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  .ref-box{
    margin-top: 1.35rem;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: rgba(46,59,36,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.16);
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.84rem;
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  .ref-box strong{ color: var(--green-dark); }

  /* DASHBOARD */
  .dashboard-wrap{
    width: min(1030px, 100%);
    margin: 0 auto;
    animation: tsiinoFadeUp 0.95s ease both;
  }

  @keyframes tsiinoFadeUp{
    from{ opacity: 0; transform: translateY(26px); filter: blur(4px); }
    to{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); filter: blur(0); }
  }

  .metric-grid{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
    margin: 1.4rem 0 1.6rem 0;
  }

  .metric-card{
    position: relative;
    background:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255,253,247,0.94), rgba(255,253,247,0.94)),
      url("../figures/tsiino_bg.png");
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
    border-top: 5px solid var(--green-map);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 1rem 1rem 1.05rem 1rem;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
    min-height: 132px;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: help;
  }

  .metric-card::after{
    content: attr(data-tip);
    position: absolute;
    left: 1rem;
    right: 1rem;
    bottom: 0.85rem;
    padding: 0.55rem 0.65rem;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: rgba(46,59,36,0.95);
    color: var(--cream);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    line-height: 1.35;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(8px);
    transition: opacity 0.22s ease, transform 0.22s ease;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .metric-card:hover::after{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  .metric-label{
    color: var(--green-map);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .metric-value{
    color: #314761;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-top: 0.65rem;
  }

  .metric-sub{
    color: var(--muted);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    margin-top: 0.35rem;
  }

  .dashboard-grid{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.35fr) minmax(320px, 0.8fr);
    gap: 1.4rem;
    align-items: stretch;
  }

  .dash-panel{
    min-width: 0;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.94);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.20);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 1.15rem;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.09);
  }

  .dash-panel h3{
    margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.55rem);
    line-height: 1.15;
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .group-bars{ display: grid; gap: 0.85rem; }

  .group-row{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr auto;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .group-name{
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .bar-track{
    position: relative;
    height: 12px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  }

  .bar-fill{
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green-map), var(--ochre));
    transform-origin: left center;
    animation: growBar 1.1s ease both;
  }

  @keyframes growBar{
    from{ transform: scaleX(0); }
    to{ transform: scaleX(1); }
  }

  .group-value{
    color: #314761;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .plotly,
  .js-plotly-plot{
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  }

  @media (max-width: 1100px){
    .axis-feature-grid,
    .overview-layout,
    .dashboard-grid{
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .axis-grid{
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    .axis-flow{
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 991.98px){
    .page-hero{
      min-height: 100vh;
      margin-top: 0;
      padding: 0 !important;
    }

    .page-hero-logo{
      top: 3.9rem;
      left: 0.75rem;
      width: 78px;
    }

    .page-hero-content{
      top: 11.4rem;
      left: 0.75rem;
      width: calc(100% - 1.5rem);
      padding-top: 0;
    }

    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show,
    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.collapsing{
      margin-top: 0.6rem;
      padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
      width: min(280px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
      background: rgba(23,23,23,0.72) !important;
      border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.22);
      border-radius: 18px;
      box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    }

    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show .nav-link,
    #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.collapsing .nav-link{
      color: #F6F1E8 !important;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 0.45rem 0.25rem;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
    }

    .content-card{
      width: calc(100vw - 1rem);
      padding: 1.35rem 1rem;
    }

    .section-title{ grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr; }

    .axis-switch,
    .metric-grid{
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    .group-row{
      grid-template-columns: 95px 1fr;
    }

    .group-value{ grid-column: 2; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 680px){
    .page-hero-logo{ display: none; }

    .page-hero-content{
      top: 8.8rem;
      left: 1rem;
      width: calc(100% - 2rem);
      padding-top: 0;
    }

    .page-hero-content h1{
      font-size: clamp(2.65rem, 14vw, 4.1rem);
    }

    .hero-subtitle{
      font-size: 0.72rem !important;
    }

    .hero-actions{ gap: 0.45rem; }

    .btn-main,
    .btn-ghost{ width: 100%; }

    .axis-switch,
    .axis-grid,
    .axis-flow,
    .metric-grid{
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .axis-switch-card{
      min-height: auto;
    }
  }


  /* ===== Correções finais de alinhamento e navegação dos eixos ===== */

  #colecoes-registros,
  #indicadores-biodiversidade,
  .axis-section{
    width: min(1120px, calc(100vw - 2rem)) !important;
    max-width: 1120px !important;
    margin-left: auto !important;
    margin-right: auto !important;
  }

  #colecoes-registros .section-title,
  #indicadores-biodiversidade .section-title,
  .axis-section .section-title{
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
  }

  .axis-content,
  .axis-feature-grid,
  .dashboard-content,
  .dashboard-grid{
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
    margin-left: auto !important;
    margin-right: auto !important;
  }

  .axis-switch-card{
    display: flex !important;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 0.55rem;
    min-height: 190px;
  }

  .axis-switch-card::before{
    flex: 0 0 auto;
  }

  .axis-switch-card span:not(.axis-arrow){
    flex: 1 1 auto;
  }

  .axis-switch-card .axis-arrow{
    margin-top: auto !important;
    align-self: flex-start !important;
    justify-self: auto !important;
    position: static !important;
  }

  @media (max-width: 991.98px){
    #colecoes-registros,
    #indicadores-biodiversidade,
    .axis-section{
      width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
    }
  }


  /* =========================================================
     AJUSTE DEFINITIVO: CENTRALIZAÇÃO E ESPAÇAMENTO DOS EIXOS
     ========================================================= */

  /* Neutraliza o grid interno do Quarto nesta página para que os cards
     usem a largura real da viewport, como nas páginas Sobre/Expedições. */
  #quarto-content,
  main.content,
  .page-columns,
  .page-layout-full,
  .content {
    display: block !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
    grid-column: 1 / -1 !important;
  }

  /* Evita que qualquer seção herde alinhamento lateral de wrappers antigos. */
  section.content-card,
  #conservacao-dados,
  #colecoes-registros,
  #indicadores-biodiversidade,
  .axis-section,
  .overview-card {
    width: min(1120px, calc(100vw - 2rem)) !important;
    max-width: 1120px !important;
    margin-left: auto !important;
    margin-right: auto !important;
    justify-self: center !important;
    align-self: auto !important;
    grid-column: 1 / -1 !important;
  }

  /* Mais respiro entre a hero e o primeiro card. */
  #conservacao-dados.overview-card {
    margin-top: clamp(4.2rem, 7vw, 6.2rem) !important;
  }

  /* Mais respiro entre o título "Conservação e dados" e os cards dos eixos. */
  #conservacao-dados .section-title {
    margin-bottom: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.6rem) !important;
  }

  /* Centraliza o conteúdo interno sem encolher demais os blocos. */
  .content-inner,
  .axis-content,
  .dashboard-content {
    width: min(1030px, 100%) !important;
    max-width: 1030px !important;
    margin-left: auto !important;
    margin-right: auto !important;
  }

  .axis-section .section-title,
  .overview-card .section-title {
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
  }

  /* Cards dos eixos: layout sem sobreposição do "Ver eixo". */
  .axis-switch-card {
    position: relative !important;
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto !important;
    align-items: start !important;
    gap: 0.55rem 0.85rem !important;
    min-height: 170px !important;
    padding: 1.1rem 1.15rem !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  .axis-switch-card::before {
    grid-column: 1 !important;
    grid-row: 1 / span 3 !important;
    flex: 0 0 auto !important;
  }

  .axis-switch-card strong,
  .axis-switch-card span:not(.axis-arrow),
  .axis-switch-card .axis-arrow {
    grid-column: 2 !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }

  .axis-switch-card span:not(.axis-arrow) {
    overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
  }

  .axis-switch-card .axis-arrow {
    position: static !important;
    justify-self: start !important;
    align-self: end !important;
    margin-top: 0.35rem !important;
  }

  /* Eixos internos centralizados em qualquer largura. */
  .axis-feature-grid,
  .axis-grid,
  .axis-flow,
  .metric-grid,
  .dashboard-grid {
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
  }

  /* Posição da logo igual à página Sobre. */
  .page-hero-logo {
    top: clamp(5.2rem, 9vw, 7rem) !important;
    left: clamp(1.5rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem) !important;
    width: clamp(92px, 8vw, 132px) !important;
  }

  @media (max-width: 991.98px) {
    .page-hero-logo {
      top: 4.9rem !important;
      left: 0.75rem !important;
      width: 78px !important;
    }

    section.content-card,
    #conservacao-dados,
    #colecoes-registros,
    #indicadores-biodiversidade,
    .axis-section,
    .overview-card {
      width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
      max-width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
    }

    #conservacao-dados.overview-card {
      margin-top: 3.2rem !important;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 620px) {
    .page-hero-logo {
      display: none !important;
    }

    .axis-switch-card {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
      min-height: auto !important;
    }

    .axis-switch-card::before,
    .axis-switch-card strong,
    .axis-switch-card span:not(.axis-arrow),
    .axis-switch-card .axis-arrow {
      grid-column: 1 !important;
      grid-row: auto !important;
    }
  }

/* ===== Correção final: logo visível em tela intermediária =====
   Mantém a mesma posição da página Sobre e só esconde em celular muito estreito. */
.page-hero-logo {
  position: absolute !important;
  top: clamp(5.2rem, 9vw, 7rem) !important;
  left: clamp(1.5rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem) !important;
  width: clamp(92px, 8vw, 132px) !important;
  min-height: auto !important;
  display: block !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  z-index: 20 !important;
}

.page-hero-logo img {
  display: block !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
}

@media (max-width: 991.98px) and (min-width: 521px) {
  .page-hero-logo {
    top: 4.9rem !important;
    left: 0.75rem !important;
    width: 78px !important;
    display: block !important;
    visibility: visible !important;
    opacity: 1 !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 520px) {
  .page-hero-logo {
    display: none !important;
  }
}
</style>
```



```{=html}
<section class="page-hero page-hero-conservation" aria-label="Abertura da página Conservação" data-i18n-aria="conservation.hero.aria">
  <div class="page-hero-overlay"></div>

  <div class="page-hero-logo" aria-label="Logo Tsiino Hiiwiida" data-i18n-aria="conservation.hero.logoAria">
    <img
      src="../figures/logo_tsiino.png"
      alt="Logo Tsiino Hiiwiida" data-i18n-alt="conservation.hero.logoAlt"
      onerror="this.style.display='none';"
    >
  </div>

  <div class="page-hero-content">
    <div class="hero-kicker" data-i18n="conservation.hero.kicker">Conservação · Dados · Coleções científicas</div>
    <h1 data-i18n="conservation.hero.title">Conservação</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle" data-i18n="conservation.hero.subtitle">Coleções, dados e conhecimento científico para apoiar a biodiversidade</p>
    <p class="hero-description" data-i18n="conservation.hero.description">
      Integração entre registros históricos, coleções científicas, indicadores de biodiversidade e dados taxonômicos sobre plantas e fungos no Alto Rio Negro.
    </p>

    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a class="btn-main" href="#conservacao-dados" data-i18n="conservation.hero.overview">Visão geral</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#colecoes-registros" data-i18n="conservation.hero.collections">Coleções</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#indicadores-biodiversidade" data-i18n="conservation.hero.indicators">Indicadores</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section id="conservacao-dados" class="content-card overview-card">
  <div class="content-inner">
    <div class="section-title">
      <h2 data-i18n="conservation.overview.title">Conservação e dados</h2>
    </div>

    <div class="axis-switch" aria-label="Eixos da página Conservação" data-i18n-aria="conservation.overview.axisAria">
      <a class="axis-switch-card" href="#colecoes-registros" data-number="01">
        <strong data-i18n="conservation.overview.axis1Title">Coleções e registros históricos</strong>
        <span data-i18n="conservation.overview.axis1Text">Memória científica, acervos, expedições históricas e revisão de dados como base para conservação.</span>
        <span class="axis-arrow" data-i18n="conservation.overview.seeAxis">Ver eixo →</span>
      </a>

      <a class="axis-switch-card" href="#indicadores-biodiversidade" data-number="02">
        <strong data-i18n="conservation.overview.axis2Title">Indicadores de biodiversidade</strong>
        <span data-i18n="conservation.overview.axis2Text">Dashboard com riqueza, registros, grupos taxonômicos e lacunas de informação do compilado do projeto.</span>
        <span class="axis-arrow" data-i18n="conservation.overview.seeAxis">Ver eixo →</span>
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="overview-layout">
      <div>
        <p class="lead" data-i18n-html="conservation.overview.lead">
          A conservação da biodiversidade na Cabeça do Cachorro, ou <strong>Tsiino Hiiwiida</strong>, depende da integração entre pesquisa de campo, coleções científicas, registros históricos, tecnologias moleculares e colaboração com comunidades locais.
        </p>

        <p data-i18n="conservation.overview.paragraph">
          Esta página apresenta os dois eixos como partes do mesmo processo: coleções e registros históricos ajudam a reconhecer lacunas, enquanto os indicadores sintetizam padrões de riqueza, ocorrência e qualidade dos dados para orientar novas decisões de pesquisa e conservação.
        </p>
      </div>

      <aside class="overview-aside" aria-label="Síntese dos eixos" data-i18n-aria="conservation.overview.asideAria">
        <div class="overview-mini">
          <strong data-i18n="conservation.overview.historicalScaleTitle">Escala histórica</strong>
          <span data-i18n="conservation.overview.historicalScaleText">Relatos, exsicatas, amostras e acervos permitem reconstruir trajetórias de documentação da biodiversidade.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="overview-mini">
          <strong data-i18n="conservation.overview.analyticalScaleTitle">Escala analítica</strong>
          <span data-i18n="conservation.overview.analyticalScaleText">Indicadores derivados do compilado Darwin Core ajudam a medir riqueza, cobertura e lacunas.</span>
        </div>
      </aside>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section id="colecoes-registros" class="content-card axis-section">
  <div class="content-inner axis-content">
    <div class="section-title">
      <h2 data-i18n="conservation.collections.sectionTitle">Coleções e registros históricos</h2>
    </div>

    <div class="axis-feature-grid">
      <div class="axis-feature-copy">
        <span class="axis-eyebrow" data-i18n="conservation.collections.eyebrow">Eixo 1</span>
        <div class="axis-title" data-i18n="conservation.collections.title">Coleções e registros históricos como base para conservação</div>

        <p class="lead" data-i18n="conservation.collections.lead">
          As coleções botânicas, micológicas e bioculturais preservam informações essenciais sobre a biodiversidade amazônica. Exsicatas, amostras, cadernos de campo, imagens, relatos de expedições e registros associados permitem recuperar dados sobre espécies, localidades, ambientes, usos e trajetórias históricas de pesquisa.
        </p>

        <p data-i18n-html="conservation.collections.paragraph">
          No contexto do projeto <strong>Tsiino Hiiwiida</strong>, o resgate das coleções históricas não é apenas uma ação retrospectiva. Ele fortalece a base científica para reconhecer padrões de distribuição, identificar áreas pouco amostradas, revisar nomes e ampliar o acesso a informações sobre a biodiversidade da Cabeça do Cachorro.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="axis-feature-panel">
        <div class="axis-grid">
          <div class="axis-info-card">
            <h4 data-i18n="conservation.collections.memoryTitle">Memória científica</h4>
            <p data-i18n="conservation.collections.memoryText">Registros históricos documentam onde, quando e como plantas e fungos foram observados, coletados e descritos ao longo do tempo.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="axis-info-card">
            <h4 data-i18n="conservation.collections.expeditionsTitle">Expedições históricas</h4>
            <p data-i18n="conservation.collections.expeditionsText">Relatos de naturalistas e coleções antigas ajudam a contextualizar a pesquisa atual no Alto Rio Negro e a reconhecer lacunas de conhecimento.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="axis-info-card">
            <h4 data-i18n="conservation.collections.reviewTitle">Revisão de acervos</h4>
            <p data-i18n="conservation.collections.reviewText">A revisão taxonômica, a digitalização e a curadoria tornam os dados históricos comparáveis aos registros atuais do projeto.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="axis-info-card">
            <h4 data-i18n="conservation.collections.informedTitle">Conservação informada</h4>
            <p data-i18n="conservation.collections.informedText">Ao integrar passado e presente, as coleções apoiam novas expedições, estudos comparativos e prioridades de documentação da biodiversidade.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="axis-flow">
      <div class="axis-flow-step">
        <strong data-i18n="conservation.collections.flowExpeditionsTitle">Expedições</strong>
        <span data-i18n="conservation.collections.flowExpeditionsText">Produzem observações, amostras, relatos, imagens e informações de campo.</span>
      </div>
      <div class="axis-flow-step">
        <strong data-i18n="conservation.collections.flowCollectionsTitle">Coleções</strong>
        <span data-i18n="conservation.collections.flowCollectionsText">Preservam evidências materiais e dados associados sobre plantas, fungos e paisagens.</span>
      </div>
      <div class="axis-flow-step">
        <strong data-i18n="conservation.collections.flowReviewTitle">Revisão</strong>
        <span data-i18n="conservation.collections.flowReviewText">Atualiza identificações, corrige lacunas e conecta registros históricos a bases digitais.</span>
      </div>
      <div class="axis-flow-step">
        <strong data-i18n="conservation.collections.flowApplicationTitle">Aplicação</strong>
        <span data-i18n="conservation.collections.flowApplicationText">Orienta novas coletas, análises biogeográficas e ações futuras de pesquisa e conservação.</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ref-box">
      <span data-i18n-html="conservation.collections.references"><strong>Referências de base para este eixo:</strong> Harden &amp; Harden (2024), sobre Spix e Martius na região do Rio Negro; Bolle (2022), sobre Alexander von Humboldt e as viagens científicas; Fonseca-Kruel et al. (2018), sobre as coleções de Richard Spruce na Amazônia; Spix &amp; Martius (2017); Spruce (1908).</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section id="indicadores-biodiversidade" class="content-card axis-section">
  <div class="content-inner axis-content">
    <div class="section-title">
      <h2 data-i18n="conservation.indicators.sectionTitle">Indicadores de biodiversidade</h2>
    </div>

    <span class="axis-eyebrow" data-i18n="conservation.indicators.eyebrow">Eixo 2</span>
    <div class="axis-title" data-i18n="conservation.indicators.title">Dashboard de indicadores de biodiversidade</div>

    <p class="lead" data-i18n="conservation.indicators.lead">
      O dashboard reúne dados organizados sobre plantas e fungos da Cabeça do Cachorro, permitindo visualizar padrões de riqueza, registros, grupos taxonômicos e lacunas de informação relevantes para pesquisa, documentação e conservação.
    </p>

    <div class="dashboard-wrap">
```
```{r metric-cards, results='asis'}
cat(
  '<div class="metric-grid">',

  '<div class="metric-card" data-tip="Número de nomes científicos distintos encontrados no compilado." data-i18n-tip="conservation.metrics.speciesTip">',
  '<div class="metric-label" data-i18n="conservation.metrics.speciesLabel">Espécies registradas</div>',
  '<div class="metric-value">', format_int(total_species), '</div>',
  '<div class="metric-sub" data-i18n="conservation.metrics.speciesSub">Plantas e fungos</div>',
  '</div>',

  '<div class="metric-card" data-tip="Número de famílias distintas preenchidas na planilha." data-i18n-tip="conservation.metrics.familiesTip">',
  '<div class="metric-label" data-i18n="conservation.metrics.familiesLabel">Famílias registradas</div>',
  '<div class="metric-value">', format_int(total_families), '</div>',
  '<div class="metric-sub" data-i18n="conservation.metrics.familiesSub">Famílias taxonômicas</div>',
  '</div>',

  '<div class="metric-card" data-tip="Ano mais antigo encontrado nas colunas year ou eventDate." data-i18n-tip="conservation.metrics.oldestTip">',
  '<div class="metric-label" data-i18n="conservation.metrics.oldestLabel">Registro mais antigo</div>',
  '<div class="metric-value">', ifelse(is.na(earliest_record), "—", earliest_record), '</div>',
  '<div class="metric-sub" data-i18n="conservation.metrics.oldestSub">Ano inicial</div>',
  '</div>',

  '<div class="metric-card" data-tip="Número total de linhas/registros considerados no dashboard." data-i18n-tip="conservation.metrics.recordsTip">',
  '<div class="metric-label" data-i18n="conservation.metrics.recordsLabel">Registros analisados</div>',
  '<div class="metric-value">', format_int(total_records), '</div>',
  '<div class="metric-sub" data-i18n="conservation.metrics.recordsSub">Ocorrências no compilado</div>',
  '</div>',

  '</div>'
)
```

```{=html}
<div class="dashboard-grid">
  <div class="dash-panel" id="panel-species-by-group">
    <h3 data-i18n="conservation.dashboard.speciesByGroup">Espécies por grupo biológico</h3>
```

```{r organism-bars, results='asis'}
max_n <- max(group_summary$species, na.rm = TRUE)

cat('<div class="group-bars">')

for (i in seq_len(nrow(group_summary))) {
  width <- ifelse(max_n > 0, round(100 * group_summary$species[i] / max_n, 1), 0)

  cat(
    '<div class="group-row" title="', group_summary$label[i], '">',
    '<div class="group-name" data-i18n-group="', group_summary$organism_group[i], '">', group_summary$organism_group[i], '</div>',
    '<div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:', width, '%;"></div></div>',
    '<div class="group-value">', group_summary$label[i], '</div>',
    '</div>'
  )
}

cat('</div>')
```

```{=html}
    <div class="note-box">
      <span data-i18n-html="conservation.dashboard.note">Passe o cursor sobre as barras e cartões para ver os valores. Os grupos são detectados automaticamente a partir de colunas como <code>kingdom</code>, <code>phylum</code>, <code>higherClassification</code> ou equivalentes.</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="dash-panel" id="panel-taxonomic-summary">
    <h3 data-i18n="conservation.dashboard.taxonomicSummary">Resumo taxonômico</h3>
```

```{r group-donut}
donut <- plot_ly(
  group_summary,
  labels = ~organism_group,
  values = ~species,
  type = "pie",
  hole = 0.58,
  textinfo = "label+percent",
  hovertemplate = paste(
    "<b>%{label}</b><br>",
    "Espécies: %{value}<br>",
    "Proporção: %{percent}",
    "<extra></extra>"
  ),
  marker = list(
    colors = c("#626A38", "#A93632", "#D99A27", "#59602F", "#2E3B24"),
    line = list(color = "#FFFDF7", width = 2)
  )
) |>
  layout(
    showlegend = FALSE,
    margin = list(l = 5, r = 5, t = 5, b = 5),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(family = "Montserrat", color = "#171717")
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE, responsive = TRUE)

donut
```

```{=html}
  </div>
</div>

<div class="dashboard-grid" style="margin-top:1.4rem;">
  <div class="dash-panel" id="panel-cumulative-species">
    <h3 data-i18n="conservation.dashboard.cumulativeSpecies">Registros cumulativos de espécies</h3>
```

```{r cumulative-plot}
if (nrow(cumulative) > 0) {
  p_cum <- plot_ly(
    cumulative,
    x = ~year_record,
    y = ~cumulative_species,
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "lines",
    fill = "tozeroy",
    line = list(color = "#A93632", width = 3, shape = "hv"),
    fillcolor = "rgba(169,54,50,0.18)",
    hovertemplate = paste(
      "<b>Ano: %{x}</b><br>",
      "Total cumulativo: %{y} espécies<br>",
      "<extra></extra>"
    )
  ) |>
    layout(
      xaxis = list(
        title = "Ano",
        zeroline = FALSE,
        gridcolor = "rgba(98,106,56,0.12)",
        linecolor = "rgba(98,106,56,0.35)"
      ),
      yaxis = list(
        title = "Espécies acumuladas",
        zeroline = FALSE,
        gridcolor = "rgba(98,106,56,0.12)",
        linecolor = "rgba(98,106,56,0.35)"
      ),
      margin = list(l = 65, r = 20, t = 10, b = 65),
      paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      font = list(family = "Montserrat", color = "#171717")
    ) |>
    config(
      displaylogo = FALSE,
      responsive = TRUE
    )

  p_cum
} else {
  htmltools::div(
    class = "note-box",
    htmltools::tags$span(`data-i18n` = "conservation.dashboard.noValidYears", "Não há anos válidos em year/eventDate para montar a série cumulativa.")
  )
}
```

```{=html}
  </div>

  <div class="dash-panel" id="panel-quick-reading">
    <h3 data-i18n="conservation.dashboard.quickReading">Leitura rápida</h3>
```

```{r quick-reading, results='asis'}
cat(
  '<div class="note-box" style="margin-top:0;">',
  '<strong>', format_int(total_species), '</strong> <span data-i18n="conservation.quick.distinctRecognized">espécies distintas foram reconhecidas no compilado, distribuídas em</span> ',
  '<strong>', format_int(total_families), '</strong> <span data-i18n="conservation.quick.familiesAnd">famílias e</span> ',
  '<strong>', format_int(total_genera), '</strong> <span data-i18n="conservation.quick.genera">gêneros.</span>',
  '<br><br>',
  '<span data-i18n="conservation.quick.mainGroups1">Entre os grupos principais, há</span> <strong>', format_int(plants_species), '</strong> <span data-i18n="conservation.quick.plantSpecies">espécies de plantas e</span> ',
  '<strong>', format_int(fungi_species), '</strong> <span data-i18n="conservation.quick.fungiSpecies">espécies de fungos.</span>',
  '<br><br>',
  '<span data-i18n="conservation.quick.oldestRecord">O registro mais antigo identificado é de</span> <strong>', ifelse(is.na(earliest_record), "ano não informado", earliest_record), '</strong>. ',
  '<span data-i18n="conservation.quick.latestRecord">O registro mais recente é de</span> <strong>', ifelse(is.na(latest_record), "ano não informado", latest_record), '</strong>.',
  '<br><br>',
  '<span data-i18n="conservation.quick.latestScientificName">Último nome científico associado ao ano mais recente:</span> <em>', htmlEscape(last_species), '</em>.',
  '</div>'
)
```

```{=html}
  </div>
</div>

<div class="dash-panel" id="panel-family-richness" style="margin-top:1.4rem;">
  <h3 data-i18n="conservation.dashboard.familyRichness">Famílias com maior riqueza registrada</h3>
```

```{r families-plot}
if (nrow(family_top) > 0) {
  family_top_plot <- family_top |>
    arrange(species) |>
    mutate(family_name = factor(family_name, levels = family_name))

  p_family <- plot_ly(
    family_top_plot,
    x = ~species,
    y = ~family_name,
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    color = ~organism_group,
    colors = c("Plantas" = "#626A38", "Fungos" = "#A93632", "Outros" = "#D99A27", "Sem grupo definido" = "#59602F"),
    hovertemplate = paste(
      "<b>%{y}</b><br>",
      "Espécies: %{x}<br>",
      "<extra></extra>"
    )
  ) |>
    layout(
      barmode = "stack",
      xaxis = list(
        title = "Espécies",
        zeroline = FALSE,
        gridcolor = "rgba(98,106,56,0.12)"
      ),
      yaxis = list(
        title = "",
        zeroline = FALSE,
        gridcolor = "rgba(98,106,56,0.08)"
      ),
      legend = list(
        orientation = "h",
        x = 0,
        y = -0.18
      ),
      margin = list(l = 120, r = 20, t = 10, b = 80),
      paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      font = list(family = "Montserrat", color = "#171717")
    ) |>
    config(
      displaylogo = FALSE,
      responsive = TRUE
    )

  p_family
} else {
  htmltools::div(
    class = "note-box",
    htmltools::tags$span(`data-i18n` = "conservation.dashboard.noFamilyInfo", "Não há informação de família suficiente para montar este gráfico.")
  )
}
```
